features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The hawk has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hawk's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Beak
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage if the target is Bloodied.

tactical_info.tactics: Works in flocks using pack tactics. Excellent perception spots wounded prey. Does extra damage to bloodied enemies, making it deadly in group hunts.
